Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The transitions are After event 3 to 4 temp vibration flow tool pos energy all jump up start of cutting After event 6 to 7 temp drops vibration drops flow drops pressure up tool pos jumps start of assembly After event 8 to 9 temp spikes vibration spikes flow drops to 0 energy spikes start of welding After event 9 to 10 temp drops vibration drops pressure drops energy drops start of cooldown inspection After event 12 to 13 all values drop back to idle baseline end of cycle back to idle
